title: Limo4317's Horror Pack
description: In this pack, I have collected many horror mods... It's a truly terrifying experience :)
body:
# 🩸 Limo4317's Horror Pack

**Limo4317's Horror Pack** is a spine-chilling Minecraft modpack designed to transform your world into a terrifying survival experience. Encounter relentless creatures and survive in an atmosphere filled with tension, darkness, and mystery.

## 👁️ Features

* 🌑 **Immersive Horror Atmosphere** 
* 👹 **Terrifying Entities** 
* ⚔️ **Survival Challenges**
* 🔦 **Exploration & Mystery** 


<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>

- coming soon

</details>



## 🎮 Recommended Playstyle

* Play with **friends** for a co-op horror experience.
* Use **headphones** for maximum immersion.
* Keep the lights **off**… if you dare.

## ⚠️ Warning

This modpack is designed to create tension, fear, and suspense. Expect jump scares, disturbing sounds, and intense survival moments.

Spoilers in the gallery!!!

Report issues on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/mZD8FnCJNc).

---

**Will you survive the darkness… or become part of it?**

![Red eyes looking right at you out of the darkness.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e35f14ef19a8878a55453759ca476571287efd3f_0.webp)
